exchanges.prompt: Design a multi-cloud architecture using AWS S3 for storage, Azure Functions for compute, and GCP BigQuery for analytics with a Kubernetes orchestration layer

response.content:
sequenceDiagram
  participant AWS_S3 as AWS S3 Storage
  participant AZURE_FUNCTIONS as Azure Functions Compute
  participant GCP_BIGQUERY as GCP BigQuery Analytics
  participant K8S as Kubernetes Orchestration
  participant APP as Application

  APP->>K8S: Deploy Application
  K8S->>AZURE_FUNCTIONS: Trigger Azure Function
  AZURE_FUNCTIONS->>AWS_S3: Read Data from S3
  AWS_S3-->>AZURE_FUNCTIONS: Return Data
  AZURE_FUNCTIONS->>GCP_BIGQUERY: Send Data to BigQuery
  GCP_BIGQUERY-->>AZURE_FUNCTIONS: Return Analytics Results
  AZURE_FUNCTIONS-->>K8S: Return Processing Results
  K8S-->>APP: Return Results to Application

  activate AZURE_FUNCTIONS
  AZURE_FUNCTIONS->>GCP_BIGQUERY: Stream Data to BigQuery
  deactivate AZURE_FUNCTIONS

  activate GCP_BIGQUERY
  GCP_BIGQUERY->>GCP_BIGQUERY: Perform Analytics
  deactivate GCP_BIGQUERY

  activate K8S
  K8S->>AZURE_FUNCTIONS: Manage Azure Function
  K8S->>GCP_BIGQUERY: Manage BigQuery
  deactivate K8S
